text.transcription: 道光二年歳次壬午端月置

normalization.div: 道光2年歳次壬午端月置

transliterations.transliteration: tō Kong Jī Liân 歳 次 壬 ngóo tuann Gue̍h tì
dou3/dou6 gwong1 ji6 nin4 歳ci3 jam4 ng5 dyun1 jyut6 zi3
dào guāng èr nián suì cì rén wǔ duān yuè zhì

text.transcription: 誥贈宜人顯妣慈柔吳門張太君墓

normalization.div: 誥贈宜人顯妣慈柔吳門張太君墓

transliterations.transliteration: 誥 tsīng Gî jîn/bí hián pí tsû jiû ngôo mn̂g tiunn Thāi kun bōng
gou3 zang6 ji4 jan4 hin2 bei2 ci4 jau4 ng4 mun4 zoeng1/zoeng3 taai3 gwan1 mou6
gào zèng yí rén xiǎn bǐ cí róu wú mén zhāng tài jūn mù

trans.div: The imperial edict is a gift to a pleasant person and shows the kindness and gentleness of his heir. The tomb of Taijun Zhang of Wumen

names.name: carving an expression of political loyalty

transliterations.transliteration: píng sin Jī gue̍h tiông siu
bing2 san1 ji6 jyut6 cung4/cung5/zung6 sau1
bǐng shēn èr yuè zhòng xiū

trans.div: Bingshen will be renovated in February

text.transcription: 吳家曆代烈祖烈宗合葬之茔

normalization.div: 吳家曆代烈祖烈宗合葬之茔

transliterations.transliteration: Ngôo sī li̍k tài Lia̍t tsóo Lia̍t tsong ha̍p tsòng tsi 茔
ng4 gaa1/gu1 lik6 doi6 lit6 zou2 lit6 zung1 gap3/hap6 zong3 zi1 jing4
wú jiā lì dài liè zǔ liè zōng hé zàng zhī yíng

trans.div: The tombs of all the great ancestors of the Wu family were buried together

text.transcription: 道光二年歲次壬午端月置

normalization.div: 道光2年歲次壬午端月置

dào guāng èr nián suì cì rén wǔ duān yuè zhì

trans.div: Daoguang 2nd year, Renwu Dragon Moon Place

man4 gwok3 jyut3/jyut6 cau2 nin4 sau1

trans.div: Revised in the Yichou Year of the Republic of China

trans.div: Revised in the Guichou Year of the Republic of China

zou2 bei2 lam4 sou1 si6/zi1 gin3/jin6 jing4
zǔ bǐ lín sū shì jiàn yíng

trans.div: Ancestral concubine Lin Su meets her grave

transliterations.transliteration: tō Kong píng ngóo kue gue̍h
dou3/dou6 gwong1 bing2 ng5 gwaa1 jyut6
dào guāng bǐng wǔ guā yuè

text.transcription: 例贈顕妣貞烈?門陳氏人宜人佳城
